_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Warlock; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)

name: Warlock
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Antimagic
perks.effect: +20% Damage Reduction against all magical elements except Divine, Curse and Neutral

perks.name: Curse Mastery
perks.effect: Extends curse durations (Curse of Pain 10.4s, Curse of Weakness 15s, Power of Sacrifice 15.6s)

perks.name: Dark Enhancement
perks.effect: +20% Dark Power Bonus for dark magic spells

perks.name: Dark Reflection
perks.effect: Reflect 15 Dark Magical Base Damage (25% scaling) to melee attackers

perks.name: Demon Armor
perks.effect: Gain the ability to equip plate armor; -10% Spell Casting Speed

perks.name: Immortal Lament
perks.effect: Own spells cannot reduce health below 1; healing boost below 5% health

perks.name: Infernal Pledge
perks.effect: +10% damage reduction and +15% damage bonus vs Undead and Demon races

perks.name: Shadow Touch
perks.effect: Melee attacks deal dark damage and heal you

perks.name: Soul Collector
perks.effect: Final blows collect a darkness shard

perks.name: Torture Mastery
perks.effect: Curse damage ticks heal you; spells cost 2x health

skills.name: Blood Pact
skills.effect: Take the form of your contracted demon, gaining an additional max health, armor rating, and magic resistance. Your entire body is covered in Abyssal Flame, taking damage per second and dealing magical damage per second to nearby characters. Once activated, the effect cannot be stopped until the contract is complete. Additionally, by consuming Darkness Shards, you gain all attributes, dark magical damage bonus for each Darkness Shard consumed. When you become a demon your skills change to demon-only skills. Left-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then performs bare-handed attack. Perform up to 4 combo attacks using both hands. Right-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then fires a bolt of darkness.

skills.name: Blow of Corruption
skills.effect: Your next physical attack deals evil magical damage to the target and reduces their incoming physical healing by and incoming magical healing by for seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Dark Offering
skills.effect: Channel your mind, sacrificing of your max health per second to gain magical damage bonus and physical damage bonus. This bonus lasts for seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Phantomize
skills.effect: Phase through melee attacks and projectiles for seconds. While active, gain move speed bonus and lose magical damage reduction. During this period you can only move and do not collide with other players or monsters. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.
